data.body: Implemented: rewrote plan_review_T5c.md with an explicit trust-boundary scope gate generalized across all four dimensions (authn/authz, encryption-in-transit, least-privilege, secret-lifecycle); folded in the plan-review advisories — mixed-scope rule (sub-checks apply only to boundary-crossing components), ambiguous-reachability fallback (silent-on-network => not-applicable), and a concrete 'lower severity = advisory' zero-trust caveat. Mirrored the framing in the T5c routing checklist (new leading trust_boundary key). T10 left unchanged; added test_t10_not_reframed_by_trust_boundary_generalisation. ADR 0018 records the decision + T10 exclusion. Live old-vs-new calibration (docs/calibration/T5c_trust_boundary.md): d251 positive stays fire; 8a1c false-positive flips fire->no-fire; 4702 stays no-fire. validate-routing + plan-review unit tests + make lint green.
